description_long: This is a rectangular wooden chest of drawers with a rich, dark brown finish and a smooth, flat top surface. The front features two spacious drawers, each equipped with a curved metal bar pull handle in a brass or bronze tone. The drawers are partially open, revealing a simple, unadorned interior. The sides and back are plain, with no visible decorative elements or additional hardware. The wood grain is subtly visible across all surfaces, giving the piece a classic and sturdy appearance. The overall construction suggests it is designed for practical storage in environments such as garages, hallways, or urban residential spaces.
description: A dark brown wooden chest of drawers with two large drawers and brass bar pull handles, featuring a smooth, flat top and a classic, sturdy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both drawers partially open, with visible brass bar pull handles and the flat top surface.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain wooden side panel and the depth of the open drawers.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, flat wooden back panel with visible wood grain.
description_view_3: Right side view highlighting the plain side panel and the open drawers extending outward.
